name: Easy Apple Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 20 min.
Baking time: 25 to 35 min.
Oven temperature: 375 degrees F.
This is an easy-to-prepare variation of an old family favorite. Use baking apples for best flavor.
1. Prepare the apples by making slits in each one.
2. Place the apples in lightly greased custard cups and dust with sugar and cinnamon.
3. Stir together the sugar, flour, and baking powder. Mix in the egg and melted butter.
4. Spoon the batter over the apples, dividing evenly. Sprinkle with walnuts and orange rind.
5. Bake at 375 degrees F until the apples are soft and the batter is golden brown, about 25 to 35 minutes.
6. Serve the apples slightly warm with orange ice cream or a dollop of whipped cream, if desired.
Tips: These apple dumplings can be baked ahead of time and reheated when serving.
